name: Pasta Without Tomato- New
recipeIngredient: 1 whole Lean Italian sausage link, chopped
1/4 cup chopped onions, or more, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Micro-cook the spaghetti squash or use leftover.
2. Cook pastas together.
3. Sauté: While the pasta is cooking, brown the sausage. Add olive oil and onions, carrots, and fennel stalk (or 1/4 cup chopped celery). Add chicken broth as needed to soften the vegetables. Add garlic, mushrooms, and Italian herbs. Continue cooking and stirring until mushrooms are warmed (not limp). Remove from heat but keep warm.
4. Assemble: Drain the pasta but do not rinse. Put pasta back in the pot. Add squash and stir to mix. Add the saute mixture to the pasta pot and stir. Beat one egg (or use 1/4 cup egg substitute). Turn on the heat.
5. Make a well in the center of the egg mixture. Working quickly, pour the egg into the well and stir constantly to coat, bind, and cook the egg. Season with basil, oregano, more pepper, salt to taste, cilantro, parsley, and pars
